induction_input: The cake the chef baked burned.
The bill the senator proposed failed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The dog the trainer taught performed.
The song the artist wrote sold.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a reduced relative clause structure: "The [noun] the [agent] [verb] [verb]ed," where a professional acts on an object that then undergoes an outcome.
